content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty up +0.49%, IT/Pharma/Auto leading; metals weak. VIX easing to 17.21. Book is 50% deployed with +0.71% unrealized today. Several positions need SL trailing after favorable moves. Existing OPEN orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) should be reviewed.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +5.6% unrealized after Q4 beat. Already trailed SL at 1028 (above entry 984, locking ~4.5% gain). Today's intraday is consolidating 1036-1050 — no need to tighten further yet, give it room above pivot 989. SL=current SL, target=current — but note: this is essentially a HOLD per no-op rule. Reclassifying to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1028 (locks +4.5%). Price consolidating after sharp run. Hold for target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. -1.9% within tolerance, SL 119 unchanged. Fed decision pending — gold ETF acts as portfolio insurance."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "NESTLEIND +2.9% after Q4 blowout. Trailing mandate (>+2%) — moving SL from 1425 to 1438 (above entry 1412.94, locking ~+1.8%). Stock at 52w high; tightening protects gains while leaving room toward 1485 target. Risk-reward: ~14 risk vs 31 reward = 1:2.2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 398.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "NTPC SL was at entry (404.50). Today CMP 404.45 — price reverted to entry. Loosening SL to 398 would VIOLATE the tighten-only rule. Cancel this — keep HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat position, SL at entry already protective. Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA +1.5% on Organon deal momentum, 5.3x volume. Tightening SL from 1735 to 1742 — above entry 1734, locks small gain. Macquarie TP 2150. Risk ~17 vs reward ~71 = 1:4."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.2%. SL 315 (1.7% below entry) acceptable. Q4 results May 19 pending. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat with +11% PAT, dividend Rs 5.25. -0.7% intraday but SL 465 tight (~0.85% below entry). Hold through dividend ex-date catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Tomorrow Apr 30 is ex-dividend date for Rs 11/share interim — mechanical price drop expected. Stock retreating from 628 → 608 ahead of ex-date. SL 590 (3.6% below entry) gives room to absorb the dividend adjustment. Hold; will reassess post-ex."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIENT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TOMORROW (Apr 30) with potential QIP/fund-raise on agenda — binary event. Jefferies cut TP. Stock +21% MTD has front-run upside. Per philosophy, binary event days are not accumulation days. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not on the deep-dive data list. No data to act on."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TECHM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 missed Bloomberg consensus by 10%, stock fell on results. FY27 IT guidance muted. Not a clean entry vs sector. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA_ADD",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Already hold COALINDIA. Cluster discipline: NTPC + COALINDIA + POWERGRID = ~3 energy/utility names already. Don't add."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1028 (locks +4.5%). Consolidating, give it room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge into Fed event. SL unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL above entry to lock gains after Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry — already breakeven protected. No loosening allowed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL above entry on Organon-driven volume surge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL acceptable. Wait for Q4 May 19."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 465.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL already; post-Q4 dividend catalyst intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 590.00,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend tomorrow — mechanical drop expected. Wider SL absorbs adjustment."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ADANIENT — wait for Q4 print Apr 30 PM and watch for QIP terms. RKFORGE/INTELLECT/RRKABEL — momentum names but cluster risk; reassess on pullback. BANDHANBNK — strong Q4 result; could enter on consolidation above 200. MARUTI — auto leadership but expensive entry chasing +2% sector day.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed across 8 positions — well diversified. Energy/utility cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) = ~33k+30k+47k ≈ 11% of capital, within limits. Today's actions focus on TRAILING SLs to lock in gains on the winners (NESTLEIND, SUNPHARMA, PNBHOUSING already done) rather than adding new exposure. Two binary catalysts tomorrow: Fed decision (GOLDBEES hedge in place) + ADANIENT Q4. Pending OPEN orders (GLENMARK 2400, PHARMABEES 23.65, TATAPOWER 443) — letting them work; will review next tick if still unfilled. Recent 5-day performance is poor (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4) — this reinforces tighter risk management and slower deployment, NOT chasing more setups. Capital preservation mode."
}
